title: Light Romantic Garlic Haricot Beans Stir-fry
description: A light and romantic Ukrainian dish featuring haricot beans, sautéed with garlic for a simple yet delicious meal.
instructions: Rinse the dried haricot beans and soak them in water for at least 6 hours or overnight.
Drain the soaked beans, rinse under cold water, then add to a pot with enough fresh water. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer until tender (about 1 hour).
While the beans are cooking, chop the garlic finely and thinly slice the onion.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add chopped garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds or until fragrant.
Add sliced onions to the skillet with the garlic. Cook for another minute until they start to soften slightly.
Add cooked haricot beans, salt, and pepper to taste. Stir well to combine all ingredients evenly.
Reduce heat to low and let everything simmer together in the skillet for about 5 minutes or until the sauce thickens a bit.
